title: Added Docs Viewer Route Context And Panel Layout Owners
summary: Added focused Docs Viewer app-shell owners for route dataset normalization, public/manage access flags, shell ref collection, and the current compatibility panel projection for index and document/search/recent visibility.
effect: The shared Docs Viewer entrypoint remains the route boot and controller orchestration layer while route context and panel projection now have small testable owners. This gives the next info-panel and hosted-view slices explicit context, access, ref, and projection surfaces without moving generated-data reads, payload rendering, search/recent rendering, bookmark storage, or management write workflows.
verification: node syntax checks passed for docs-viewer.js, docs-viewer-app-shell.js, docs-viewer-app-context.js, and docs-viewer-panel-layout.js
focused app-shell module smoke passed with route-context, shell-ref, and panel-layout coverage
public Docs Viewer read-only smoke passed against /tmp/dlf-jekyll-build
standalone Docs Viewer service manage smoke passed
Docs Viewer management modal smoke passed on desktop and mobile viewports
